case_title: MERIWEST CREDIT UNION VS. TASHA RENEE DEEM ET AL

docket_entries.description: SPECIALLY APPEARING DEFENDANTS NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO QUASH SUMMONS FILED BY DEFENDANT DEEM, TASHA RENEE HEARING SET FOR OCT-10-2025 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 301
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPOR OF MOTION TO QUASH SUMMONS FILED BY DEFENDANT DEEM, TASHA RENEE
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL OD MOTION TO QUASH SUMMONS; MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES ISO MOTION TO QUASH; DECLARATION ISO MOTION TO QUASH; [PROPOSED] ORDER FILED BY DEFENDANT DEEM, TASHA RENEE
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-10-25 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANT TASHA DEEM'S MOTION TO QUASH SUMMONS IS DENIED. THE COURT CREDITS THE PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE SIGNED BY THE PROCESS SERVER UNDER PENALTY OF PERJURY THAT THE REQUIREMENTS FOR SUBSTITUTED SERVICE WERE COMPLIED WITH. MS. DEEM MUST FILE A RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 31, 2025. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING IN COMPLAINCE WITH CRC 3.1312. VISITING JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/HEK)

calendar.matters:
Specially Appearing Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Summons
Off Calendar Oct-10-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT TASHA DEEM's Motion To Quash Summons.

Defendant Tasha Deem's motion to quash service of summons is denied. The court credits the proof of service of summons and declaration of diligence signed by the process server under penalty of perjury that the requirements for substituted service were complied with. Ms. Deem must file a response to the complaint no later than October 31, 2025.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling in complaince with CRC 3.1312.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/HEK)
